instruction:
The table below gives approximate values for three functions, $f$, $g$, and $h$. One is exponential, one is trigonometric, and one is a power function.
$\begin{array}{cccccc}\hline x &-2 &-1 & 0 & 1 & 2 \\ \hline f(x) & 0.056 & 0.167 & 0.5 & 1.5 & 4.5 \\ \hline g(x) & 16 & 2 & 0 &-2 &-16 \\ \hline h(x) & 9 & 8 & 9 & 10 & 9 \\ \hline \end{array}$
(a) Which function is the trigonometric function? [ANS] (b) Which function is the exponential function? [ANS] Find a formula for the exponential function $y=$ [ANS]
(c) Which function is the power function? [ANS] Find a formula for the power function $y=$ [ANS]
